reviews.review_title: I like the game, but there is a problem
reviews.review_description:
The model is ripped right from scary baboon

Other than that, it's a pretty good game.

The gameplay is fun and the game runs very smooth. The only problem is that some of the jump-scares don’t work. This game just realesed so I was expecting a lot of bugs but there was only one which was the jumpscares. Great game I would recommend. 

- Devmonkey

reviews.review_title: Too the owner of monk lab
reviews.review_description: This game is super fun and scary and idk why it died out but good job and keep up the hard work you put into this game and ape foundation
Nice to see the progress, it's a honor to be a mod for your game fairy, also w lucks,
